atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states the left shoulder pain is not getting better.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as constant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is worse with overhead activity.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is worse when lying on the affected side.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports doing a lot of work in his basement.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient speculates the basement work might be related to the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he hasn't tried icing the shoulder recently.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he hasn't taken any medication for the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals limited active and passive range of motion in the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Palpation of the greater tuberosity elicits tenderness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Capillary refill is less than three seconds in the left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Sensory examination is intact to light touch.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The x-ray of the shoulder was normal, showing no fractures or bony abnormalities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor prescribes acetaminophen as needed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor prescribes a steroid injection of the shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor is referring the patient to physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor plans physical therapy for approximately six to eight weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor orders an MRI of the left shoulder.
